2605.15980.caption_zh: 图3：在运动、美学和提示跟随三个维度上对原始Wan2.1（奇数行）和Flash-GRPO（偶数行）的定性对比。Flash-GRPO生成的视频具有增强的时间动态性（骑马序列）、更高的视觉质量与更丰富的细节（熊猫场景），并能更好地遵循提示语，添加额外元素（带有蝴蝶的卡通动物，已在红色方框中高亮显示）。

2605.15320.caption: Figure 3:FFAvatarpipeline.FFAvatarreconstructs a canonical Gaussian head avatar from few-shot views using a Multi-view Query-Former, with canonical FLAME vertices as queries and source features as keys/values. An end-to-end FLAME Estimator predicts expressionψ\psi, local articulationθ\theta, and head poseπ\pifrom driving frames, avoiding offline FLAME preprocessing. A few-to-many objective further improves generalization to unseen expressions and poses.
2605.15320.caption_zh: 图 3：FFAvatar 管线。FFAvatar 通过多视角查询转换器（Multi-view Query-Former），以规范 FLAME 顶点为查询、源特征为键/值，从少量视角图像重建出规范高斯头部化身。端到端 FLAME 估计器从驱动帧预测表情 ψ、局部关节 θ 与头部姿态 π，无需离线 FLAME 预处理。少样本到多样本训练目标进一步提升了对未见表情与姿态的泛化能力。

2605.15320.caption:
Figure 2:Three-stage trainingofFFAvatar.
Scalable pretraining fosters generalization across unseen identities by training on our private large-scale multi-frame-per-identity dataset MFHQ-1M, multi-view fine-tuning enhances geometric fidelity by optimizing the pretrained weights on a small-scale set of 360°\degreemulti-view captures (e.g.Ava256[18]), and lightweight personalization efficiently improves identity preservation with a few hundred tuning steps for a target identity in<7<7seconds on a single A100 GPU.
2605.15320.caption_zh: 图2：FFAvatar的三阶段训练流程。可扩展的预训练阶段利用我们自建的大规模每人多帧数据集MFHQ-1M进行训练，提升对未见身份的泛化能力；多视图微调阶段通过在小规模360°多视图捕获数据集（如Ava256[18]）上优化预训练权重，增强几何保真度；轻量化个性化阶段针对目标身份，在单张A100 GPU上以数百次优化步骤于7秒内高效提升身份保持效果。

2605.15320.caption: Figure 4:FFAvatarqualitative comparisonfor self-reenactment on theAva256test set (top two rows) and cross-reenactment on theNeRSemblebenchmark (bottom two rows).FFAvatar-1 view achieves more faithful and geometrically consistent results than the baselines. GAGAvatar[2]often produces over-smoothed textures and pose misalignment, while LAM[9]shows geometry artifacts under challenging views. Additional input views and optional personalization further improve identity preservation and detail.
2605.15320.caption_zh: 图 4：FFAvatar 在 Ava256 测试集（上两行）上的自我重演及在 NeRSemble 基准（下两行）上的交叉重演的定性对比。FFAvatar-1 view 相较于基线方法取得了更真实、几何一致的结果。GAGAvatar [2] 常产生过度平滑的纹理与姿态错位，而 LAM [9] 在挑战性视角下呈现几何伪影。额外的输入视角与可选个性化进一步提升了身份保持与细节表现。

2605.14333.caption: Figure 3:Illustration of the proposed framework.In addition to standard tokenizer losses,InsightTokintroduces localized, content-aware perceptual losses,ℒtext\mathcal{L}_{\text{text}}andℒface\mathcal{L}_{\text{face}}, to prioritize critical text and face regions. These regions are detected and sampled from both the original and reconstructed images, and processed through domain-specific recognition models to compute the perceptual losses.
2605.14333.caption_zh: 图 3：所提出框架示意图。除了标准的分词器损失外，InsightTok 引入了局部化的、内容感知的感知损失——ℒtext 和 ℒface，以优先处理关键文本和人脸区域。这些区域从原始图像和重建图像中检测并采样，并通过特定领域的识别模型进行处理，以计算感知损失。

2605.14333.caption: Figure 4:Illustration of face alignment.The facial region is warped to align with the canonical template based on optimal landmark matching.
2605.14333.caption_zh: 图4：面部对齐示意图。基于最优特征点匹配，将面部区域进行形变以对齐至标准模板。

2605.15375.caption: Figure 2:Up.Training pipeline of ChangeFlow using latent rectified flow conditioned on bi-temporal feature difference.Down.During inference, we iteratively generate a change mask by integrating the velocity field. We aggregate multiple samples to form the final prediction and a confidence for the change class from sample agreement.
2605.15375.caption_zh: 图2：上：基于双时相特征差异的条件隐空间修正流的ChangeFlow训练流程。下：在推理阶段，我们通过对速度场进行积分迭代生成变化掩码，并通过聚合多个样本生成最终预测结果及基于样本一致性的变化类别置信度。

2605.15375.caption: Figure 1:Unlike discriminative change detection methods,ChangeFlowpredicts binary change masks through iterative latent generation. This approach enforces global consistency within changed regions and provides better coverage of the changed area. The model inherently enables sampling-based ensembling of predictions, improving results and providing confidence estimation for the change class.
2605.15375.caption_zh: 图1：与判别式变化检测方法不同，ChangeFlow通过迭代潜在生成来预测二元变化掩码。这种方法强制变化区域内的全局一致性，并提供对变化区域更完整的覆盖。该模型本身支持基于采样的预测集成，从而改善结果并为变化类别提供置信度估计。

2605.15375.caption: Figure 4:Visualisation of intermediate steps (stride 2 for visualisation purposes) in the latent generative mask prediction (all but last column) and confidence obtained from an ensemble of predictions (last column). ChangeFlow performs iterative prediction from pure noise to a binary mask, as explained inSection˜4.1. Here, we decode the intermediate latent representation into a binary mask at each step. The final ensemble of predictions is illustrated by high-confidence regions being brighter in colour.
2605.15375.caption_zh: 图4：隐空间生成式掩码预测的中间步骤可视化（为展示效果步长设为2，除最后一列外均为中间步骤）及基于预测集成所得的置信度（最后一列）。如章节˜4.1所述，ChangeFlow从纯噪声开始迭代预测直至生成二值掩码。此处我们将每一步的中间隐层表示解码为二值掩码进行展示。最终的预测集成结果通过高置信度区域颜色更亮来呈现。

2605.10302.caption: Figure 1:Overview of reference-guided flow matching. A noisy state is matched against a reference setℛ\mathcal{R}to shift the prediction endpoint mean relative to the prediction of the pre-trained model. This results in a flow that incorporates characteristics of the reference set in an implicit manner, without requiring explicit access to a classifier or reward.
